pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new groupId and artifactId required by modern drivers.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer dependency trees; 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.
